{{ partialCached "meta-common" . }} {{if not .Page.IsHome }} {{ end }} {{- if .IsHome -}} {{- .Site.Title | markdownify }} · {{ .Site.Params.subtitle | markdownify }} {{- else -}} {{- .Title | markdownify }} · {{ .Site.Title | markdownify }} {{- end -}} {{ partialCached "stylesheet-cached" . }} {{ partial "stylesheet-dynamic" . }} {{ partialCached "favicons" . }} {{ partial "social" . }} {{ with .OutputFormats.Get "rss" -}} {{ printf `` .Rel .MediaType.Type .Permalink site.Title | safeHTML }} {{ end }}
